scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer, the ready/revoked events, and the url property. It uses v2 of the library (newer than the v1 referenced in the gold standard). The core workflow is accurate even though the gold standard focuses more on the data schema side.
scores.hallucination_notes: Some minor parameter uncertainties: the 'scheme' keyword argument to IngressPerAppRequirer constructor may not exist in v2; 'provide_ingress_requirements(port=9090)' as a dynamic post-init update method is questionable — v2 typically sets requirements at construction time; 'is_ready()' as a method may not exist (library uses events primarily). These are minor possible inaccuracies rather than fully fabricated APIs.
